extra.reason: Clean-clone CI job merged in PR #3 (squash 92cd3d8)
Thread B (Merkle DAG comparison doc) shipped in PR #4 / c6f467e. Thread A (week-long adoption trial) split out as a separate bead.
HTML output format (Option D, Mermaid-embed) shipped in PR #5 / 480716b. Self-contained ~900 KB output, defaults to component view for Go MCP servers.
Decision baked into shipped child 97x.1 (Option D Mermaid-embed). Eval purpose served; HTML format is now in main.

Split into two child beads: arch_blast_radius (transitive dep closure) and markdown substrate extension. Both retain the original acceptance criteria and reference. Parent purpose (group both ideas) achieved through children.
arch_blast_radius shipped in PR #6 / 291cd52. Pure BFS algorithm in detector/blast_radius.go, handler in tools/handlers.go, 7 test cases including cycle safety and depth cap. Tool count 17 → 18.

Won't-do for now. Multi-week adoption trial cost (Zilliz Cloud + OpenAI embeddings spend, indexing 1-2 real codebases, week of actual use) is high relative to the value, given the portfolio is already dense. Re-open if priorities shift toward semantic code search as a daily tool. Original Thread A spec preserved in the bead description for future reference.

Implemented in feat/arch-scan-markdown. Markdown analyzer with NodeNote type, wiki-link + relative .md link extraction, code-block stripping, wikilink resolver in ResolvedEdges. Integration test on AI-Knowledge: 292 notes, 1282 raw / 905 resolved edges (71% rate), 63 hubs, 40 orphans, 44ms scan.

Implemented arch_drift_explain. internal/drift/narrative.go has the deterministic templating function (no LLM); tools/ wires it as the 19th MCP tool and delegates to archDrift+Narrate. 10 unit tests cover empty diff, nil report, added/removed/modified nodes, edges-only, circular-dep validation, list truncation, type grouping, sentence count. README updated: tool count 18->19, killer-feature section, both tool tables. make check passes.

Spike implemented: LinkNotesToPackages in internal/detector/notes_to_packages.go matches inline-code-span path tokens against package directory suffixes (confidence 0.6). Tests cover unit (normalize/path-suffix/dedupe) plus integration on this repo's README ↔ internal/ tree, which produced 15 real edges (CLAUDE.md → 11 packages, design notes → 4). Findings written up in docs/cross-substrate-exploration.md: code-span matching is sufficient for design-doc use case, plain prose is too noisy, README produces zero edges (uses prose not code spans), recommended graduation path documented. Not wired into any MCP tool — graduation decision is the next bead to file.

Repo flipped to PUBLIC 2026-04-26, verified 'go install github.com/olgasafonova/code-to-arch-mcp/cmd/code-to-arch@latest' downloads and installs (29MB binary in ~/go/bin/). README Setup section now leads with the one-liner; build-from-source instructions kept as fallback. No tag yet, so @latest resolves to most recent commit on main (currently 5d1e6bf); a v0.1.0 tag is an optional future improvement for stable resolution.

Misdiagnosis. Re-tested with min_degree=8 on same vault: JSON renderer correctly returned 16 nodes / ~85 edges. The min_degree=10 empty result was correct iterative-cascade behavior — KeepHighDegree iterates until stable, and on a sparse 292-node vault with hub-and-spoke topology, min_degree=10 cascades to zero (leaves drop, hubs lose connections, hubs drop). Code is correct; UX is poor. Filing replacement bead for the actual UX issue.

Fixed in same session as filing. Added Notes []string field to ArchGenerateResult and a warning in archGenerate handler when min_degree>0 cascades the graph to zero nodes. Added two regression tests in internal/render/common_test.go documenting the cascade behavior (CascadeToEmpty + KeepsDenseSubgraph). make check + golangci-lint clean.

Rename complete. Source tree (74 files) updated, cmd/code-to-arch -> cmd/ridge, registry serverName constant -> ridge, state dir migrated on disk (~/.mcp-context/code-to-arch -> ~/.mcp-context/ridge), GitHub repo renamed (github.com/olgasafonova/code-to-arch-mcp -> github.com/olgasafonova/ridge), local git remote updated, ~/.claude.json mcpServer renamed code-to-arch -> ridge with command updated to ~/go/bin/ridge, fresh binary installed via go install ./cmd/ridge. make check + golangci-lint clean. Pushed: a8bf01d. Final step: USER must restart Claude Code to pick up new MCP server name.
